title: AIZ vs. PUK: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?

title: $865 million returned to U.S. consumers through trade-in programs in Q1 2023
text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Assurant (NYSE:AIZ), a leading global business services company that supports, protects and connects major consumer purchases, today revealed that $865 million was returned to U.S. consumers through trade-in programs during the first quarter of this year. The average trade-in value for iPhones also surpassed $200 for the first time since Q3 2021. title: Does Assurant (AIZ) Have the Potential to Rally 25.85% as Wall Street Analysts Expect?
text: The mean of analysts' price targets for Assurant (AIZ) points to a 25.9% upside in the stock. While this highly sought-after metric has not proven reasonably effective, strong agreement among analysts in raising earnings estimates does indicate an upside in the stock.

title: Assurant CEO Signs Disability:IN Letter on Disability Inclusion
text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Assurant, Inc. (NYSE: AIZ), a leading global business services company that supports, protects and connects major consumer purchases, announced that president and CEO Keith Demmings has signed the Disability:IN CEO Letter on Disability Inclusion. title: Assurant (AIZ) Q1 Earnings Top Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y

title: Assurant (AIZ) Surpasses Q1 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Assurant (AIZ) came out with quarterly earnings of $3.49 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.25 per share. This compares to earnings of $3.75 per share a year ago.

title: Assurant Reports First Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Assurant, Inc.
